title_descriptor: Ultra Elastic Antibacterial Water Repellent Knit Fabric
page_title: Ultra Elastic Antibacterial Water Repellent Knit Fabric - ArPower Knit - Ariteks
spec_line: 400 g/m², 45% Polyester 35% Viscose 22% Polyamide 8% Elastane, Water Repellent, Antibacterial, Elastic Knit Fabric
description_blocks: ArPower Knit is 40% Polyester 30% Viscose 22% Polyamide 8% Elastane, 400 g/m² ultra elastic knit fabric for corset applications.
It is antibacterial and resistant up to 20 wash.
ArPower Knit is water and oil repellent, can be used during orthopedical treatments.
2 layer of this fabric can be easily used to produce certified EN 14683 face masks.

technical_documents.label: >> ArPower Knit Data Sheet
technical_documents.context_text: Technical Parameters Fiber 40% Polyester (PES) 30% Viscose (CV) 22% Polyamide (PU) 8% Elastane (EL) EN ISO 2076 Yarn 28/1 Ne EN ISO 2060 Weight 400 ±10 g/m² EN ISO 3081 Width 1600 ±20 mm EN ISO 3932 Bursting strength > 1000 kPa (kN/m² ) EN ISO 13938-1 Dimensional Change -5% < Length < +5% ; -5% < Width < +5% EN ISO 5077 Rubbing Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 X12 Perspiration Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 E04 Washing Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 C06 Dry Cleaning Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 D01 Hypochlorite Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 N01 Hot Press Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 X11 pH 4.0- 6.5 EN ISO 3071 Azo Test No Azo Colorants EN ISO 14362-1 Application Medical Corset Quality Management Done ISO 9001 Spray Test ISO 5 EN ISO 24920 Antibacterial 99,99 % ASTM E2149 Bacterial Filtration Type IIR EN 14683 Technical Documents >> ArPower Knit Data Sheet Certificates

text_blocks.text: Medical, antibacterial, inherent antibacterial antiviral workwear fabrics. Medical Technical Textiles
Medical, antibacterial, inherent antibacterial antiviral workwear fabrics.
Medical, antibacterial, inherent antibacterial antiviral workwear fabrics.
Medical, antibacterial, inherent antibacterial antiviral workwear fabrics.
400 g/m² , 45% Polyester 35% Viscose 22% Polyamide 8% Elastane, Water Repellent, Antibacterial, Elastic Knit Fabric

ArPower Knit is 40% Polyester 30% Viscose 22% Polyamide 8% Elastane, 400 g/m² ultra elastic knit fabric for corset applications. It is antibacterial and resistant up to 20 wash. ArPower Knit is water and oil repellent, can be used during orthopedical treatments. 2 layer of this fabric can be easily used to produce certified EN 14683 face masks. ArPower Knit is 40% Polyester 30% Viscose 22% Polyamide 8% Elastane,
400 g/m² ultra elastic knit fabric for corset applications.
It is antibacterial and resistant up to 20 wash.
ArPower Knit is water and oil repellent, can be used during orthopedical treatments.
2 layer of this fabric can be easily used to produce certified EN 14683 face masks.
